title: Create record via API (POST)
preconditions: API running; authorized principal (X-User or OS user with grants)
steps: POST /api/<obj> with a JSON view body (no id)
expected_result: 200; response is the view with a new non-zero id; row exists in DB with is_active=1

title: List records (GET collection)
expected_result: 200; JSON array of view objects; FK display (rwk) columns populated

title: Get single record by id
preconditions: A record with known id exists
expected_result: 200; base object JSON for that id; numeric columns serialized as JSON numbers

title: Get view by id
expected_result: 200; view JSON including FK name/rwk columns pulled over foreign keys

title: Update record (PUT)
expected_result: 200; updated view returned; DB row reflects changes; last_updated/last_updated_by/txn_id advanced

title: Soft-delete record (DELETE)
expected_result: 200; row is NOT physically removed; is_active set to 0; record no longer in default list

title: History rows
preconditions: A record updated at least once
expected_result: 200; array of prior versions ordered by txn_id desc

title: Child collection
expected_result: 200; array of child view rows for that parent

title: Enum endpoint shape
expected_result: 200; array of objects each with exactly {id, rwkString}; rwkString = space-joined RWK display

title: Decimal/numeric JSON parity
preconditions: Object with a numeric/decimal column has data
steps: GET /api/<obj>/{id} and inspect a numeric field
expected_result: Numeric column is a JSON number (not a quoted string), matching the .NET serializer

title: Audit columns on insert
expected_result: created_by set to principal; last_updated set; txn_id set; is_active=1

title: Create via web edit page
steps: Open edit-<obj> (no id); fill fields; Save
expected_result: Record created via POST; navigation returns to list; new row visible

title: Update via web edit page
steps: Open edit-<obj>/{id}; change a field; Save
expected_result: PUT issued; change persisted; list reflects update

title: Case-insensitive object routing
expected_result: Both resolve to the same object; 200

title: Non-audited object insert/update
expected_result: Operations succeed via basic (non-audit) persist strategy; no audit columns required

title: Nav menu by parent (root)
expected_result: 200; root menu items ordered by ordinal

title: Nav menu children
preconditions: A parent menu node with children exists
expected_result: 200; child menu items for that parent in order

title: Web client loads menu unconditionally
steps: Load the app; observe MainLayout menu
expected_result: Menu loads without authentication; ClientFactory RemoteAPI call to nav menu succeeds

title: Menu ordering parameter
steps: GET byparent with orderby=ordinal vs another column
expected_result: Result order matches the requested orderby

title: Authorized principal can read
preconditions: X-User maps to op_role_member with select grant
expected_result: 200; data returned

title: Unauthorized principal blocked
preconditions: X-User maps to a user lacking the grant
expected_result: 403 Forbidden (LogicError::Unauthorized)

title: OS-user fallback
expected_result: Principal defaults to the API server OS user; authorization evaluated against that user

title: Enum authorizes as select
preconditions: User has select but no explicit enum grant
expected_result: 200; enum allowed because it is authorized under the select operation (not a separate enum op)

title: Unchecked path bypass (registration)
steps: Observe server self-registration write to core.server_node
expected_result: Succeeds with no principal via exec_unchecked; not blocked by authorization

title: ExecProof cannot be forged
steps: Attempt to call a logic dispatch without going through LogicExec
expected_result: Not possible; ExecProof constructor is private; only LogicExec mints it (compile-time guarantee)

title: Per-operation authorization
preconditions: User granted get but not delete
expected_result: GET 200; DELETE 403 (operation-level checks)

title: X-User cleared between requests
steps: Send request with X-User then one without
expected_result: Second request does not leak the first request's principal (thread-local reset)

title: Simple Rhai expression
expected_result: Executes; script_result captured; no error

title: Logging capability
expected_result: Messages appear in the host log output

title: Context read/write
steps: Run a script reading ctx.<field> and args.<key>, then mutating ctx.<field>
expected_result: Script reads seeded values; mutation written back to ctx.transaction after execution

title: Return code failure
steps: Run a script that sets ret_code = 2
expected_result: Execution reports ret_code 2; treated as failure by callers

title: Exception handling
expected_result: Error percolates; script_exception set; ret_code non-zero; reported cleanly

title: DB select capability
expected_result: Returns rows through the Logic layer; note db_* uses the CHECKED path and needs a seeded principal

title: DB get/put/update/delete via script
expected_result: Operations routed through object_exec; respect authorization

title: HTTP capability
expected_result: Performs the request via ureq; returns body/string

title: Script source column
preconditions: A core.script row with source populated
steps: Invoke ScriptHost on the script row
expected_result: Reads the 'source' column; empty source is a no-op guard

title: Sandbox limits
steps: Run a script attempting disallowed operations
expected_result: Only registered capabilities are available; engine is sandboxed

title: Before-hook logging
expected_result: run_before logs 'Invoking <Obj>.<method>' before dispatch

title: Before-hook authorization veto
expected_result: run_before authorization returns Unauthorized and short-circuits before dispatch

title: After-hook runs post-dispatch
expected_result: run_after executes after dispatch; logging after-action runs

title: After-hook notification publish
expected_result: Notification after-hook fires logic::notification::publish for the domain object

title: Reads do not publish
expected_result: No PropertyUpdated notification emitted (hook filters to insert/update/put)

title: Unchecked path skips hooks
expected_result: run_before/run_after NOT invoked; no auth, no notification (agent publishes explicitly instead)

title: Hook chain single chokepoint
steps: Verify all logic ops route through LogicExec::call
expected_result: Every authorized operation passes the before->dispatch->after chain exactly once

title: Event-service pre/post scripts (deferred)
steps: Configure pre/post event scripts on an object
expected_result: DEFERRED: event-service hook wiring is a documented TODO; verify it is a no-op today

title: Enum FK renders as dropdown
preconditions: Edit page for object with enum FK
expected_result: FK field renders a <select> with rwkString text and the referenced id as the option value

title: Parent FK renders as dropdown
preconditions: Edit page for object with a parent FK
expected_result: Parent (fkType=parent) FK also renders a dropdown (rwk string + hidden id), not a number box

title: Dropdown preselects current value
steps: Open edit page; inspect the FK dropdown
expected_result: The option whose id == record's FK id is preselected

title: Enum data loaded per FK
steps: Observe network calls on edit open
expected_result: One GET /api/<fkObject>/enum per FK field; dropdown populated from it

title: View pulls FK display columns
preconditions: List page for object with FK
expected_result: FK rwk/name columns (e.g. <fk>_name) present in the view rows

title: FK id round-trips through get
expected_result: FK id returned as a JSON number matching the stored value

title: Saving FK selection
steps: Pick a different parent in the dropdown; Save
expected_result: PUT carries the new FK id; persisted

title: rwkString excludes id columns
preconditions: Object whose RWK list contains an _id column
expected_result: rwkString omits columns ending in _id (matches getRwkString(false))

title: SSE stream connects
expected_result: Immediately prints ': connected'; connection stays open; ': keepalive' ~every 20s

title: Update emits PropertyUpdated
expected_result: An 'event: PropertyUpdated' line arrives with data {DomainObjectName, InstanceId, JsonData, Timestamp}

title: Insert emits PropertyUpdated
expected_result: PropertyUpdated event with the new InstanceId

title: Client filters by domain object
preconditions: Two list pages of different objects open
expected_result: Only the page whose _domainObjectName == A reacts; the other ignores it

title: Two-browser live update
preconditions: Two browsers on the same list page
expected_result: Browser 2's list reloads the affected row with no manual refresh

title: In-process delivery (same server)
preconditions: Update handled by the API server itself
expected_result: Delivered to local SSE clients directly (no loopback HTTP); event arrives even if hostname does not resolve

title: Cross-node fan-out
steps: Run a workflow so the agent/scheduler updates status
expected_result: Agent/scheduler POSTs to the API server's /api/Notification/publish; API broadcasts to SSE clients

title: Disconnect pruning
steps: Close the SSE client; trigger an update
expected_result: Dead client pruned on next broadcast/heartbeat; no error; other clients unaffected

title: No event for reads
expected_result: No PropertyUpdated event emitted for reads

title: Self-publish loop avoided
expected_result: Event delivered once (in-process sink); HTTP fan-out skips this node's own URL (no duplicate)

title: Agent self-registration
steps: Start scriptagent; check core.server_node and log
expected_result: Logs 'registered as ServerNode id N'; row type=Agent status=Online port in 5100-5200

title: Execute a process workflow
preconditions: Agent running; a Process workflow with a valid process->script exists
expected_result: 200; workflow queued; status moves Executing then Completed; script ran via Rhai

title: Failed script marks Failed
preconditions: Workflow whose script throws or returns non-zero
expected_result: Workflow status ends Failed; error logged

title: Busy/Online status around run
steps: Execute a workflow and watch core.server_node status
expected_result: Node goes Busy during execution then back to Online

title: test-scriptagent --init
expected_result: Creates test workflows per agent x process; dispatches each; statuses reach Completed

title: test-scriptagent re-dispatch
expected_result: Selects existing test workflows and re-dispatches them

title: Stub endpoints respond
expected_result: Each returns the documented placeholder shape (parity with .NET stubs)

title: Status changes notify web
preconditions: Web Workflow list open; agent runs a workflow
expected_result: : Workflow status transitions appear live in the web list via SSE

title: Agent shutdown marks Offline
expected_result: ctrlc handler sets the node status Offline before exit

title: Non-process workflow rejected
steps: POST execute with a Folder workflow id
expected_result: ExecuteWorkflow errors 'not a process'; no script run

title: Scheduler self-registration
steps: Start scheduler; check core.server_node and log
expected_result: Logs 'registered as ServerNode id N'; row type=Scheduler status=Online port in 5000-5100

title: Cron load on startup
preconditions: Active workflows with full cron schedule
expected_result: Loads schedules; logs N workflow(s) scheduled with parsed expressions

title: Cron fires when due
expected_result: Trigger fires; execute(workflowId) runs; dispatch occurs

title: Folder expansion + seq order
preconditions: A Folder workflow with seq-ordered Process children
expected_result: Children expanded recursively; dispatched in ascending seq order

title: Process child dispatched to agent
preconditions: Folder with a Process child bound to an agent
expected_result: Each Process child POSTed to its agent's /api/scriptagent/execute; agent runs it

title: Folder child recurses
expected_result: Folder children are re-queued to the scheduler and expanded (recursive)

title: Status set to Dispatched
steps: Execute a workflow and inspect status
expected_result: Workflow set to Dispatched by scheduler before the agent takes over (Executing->Completed)

title: Schedule reload
steps: Modify a workflow's schedule; wait up to 5 minutes
expected_result: Scheduler reloads from DB and picks up the change without restart

title: Every modifier */N
expected_result: Field becomes */5 (every 5 minutes)

title: Exactly modifier
expected_result: Field stays 30 (at :30)

title: dom/dow reconciliation
preconditions: Schedule with both dom and dow specific
expected_result: Exactly one of dom/dow restricted (dom wins, dow -> ? -> *); firing days match .NET/Quartz

title: Manual schedule never fires
expected_result: All-wildcard/Manual schedule produces no meaningful trigger; not scheduled

title: test-scheduler trees
expected_result: Builds single/sequential/concurrent/nested trees; posts each parent to /api/scheduler/execute; agents run leaves

title: Dispatch error marks Failed
preconditions: Process child whose agent url is unreachable
expected_result: That child status set to Failed; logged; other children unaffected

title: Scheduler shutdown marks Offline
expected_result: ctrlc handler sets node Offline before exit

title: ServerNode fields populated
expected_result: hostname/url/username/user_domain/os_name/os_version/architecture/registered_at populated

title: Hostname resolves in url
expected_result: url uses the real system hostname (hostname command), e.g. http://<host>:<port>; not 'unknown'

title: Port range binding
steps: Start two of the same server
expected_result: Each binds the next free port in its range (api 5200-5300, agent 5100-5200, scheduler 5000-5100)

title: Registration non-fatal
steps: Start a server with DB down momentarily
expected_result: Server still serves; registration failure logged, not fatal (spawned thread)

title: Audit overwrite of created_by
steps: Inspect created_by on the registered row
expected_result: Audit strategy sets created_by/last_updated_by; value present

title: Export to CSV
expected_result: CSV written with header (column order) + one row per record; prints 'Exported N record(s)'

title: Export unknown table
expected_result: Error 'Unknown table'; usage printed listing available tables; non-zero exit

title: Import from CSV
expected_result: Rows inserted; id and audit columns skipped; prints 'Imported N record(s)'

title: Round-trip export->import
steps: export a table; import the same CSV into it
expected_result: Imported rows match source data (ids reassigned); no type errors (PostgreSQL casts literals)

title: Import skips empty fields
expected_result: Blank cells left unset so DB defaults apply; non-empty cells set

title: Import missing file
expected_result: Error 'Input file not found'; non-zero exit

title: Export quoting
steps: Export a table with such data; re-import
expected_result: CSV correctly quoted (RFC 4180 via csv crate); round-trips intact

title: bigint round-trip
expected_result: Value preserved as i64; serialized as JSON number

title: numeric/decimal precision
steps: Insert a high-precision decimal; read back
expected_result: Value preserved exactly (stored as string internally, emitted as number on the wire)

title: timestamp round-trip
expected_result: Timestamp preserved; ISO-8601 on the wire

title: date type
expected_result: Date handled (midnight timestamp string); round-trips

title: uuid type
expected_result: UUID preserved as string

title: DB error percolates
steps: Insert a row violating a DB constraint
expected_result: Error surfaces (does not silently null); SQLSTATE/message propagated through error handling

title: varchar length overflow
preconditions: Insert a value longer than the column
expected_result: DB error (e.g. 22001 value too long) percolates clearly

title: Missing record
expected_result: Null/empty body or 404 per operation; no crash

title: Invalid JSON body
expected_result: 400 'invalid JSON body'

title: Workflow run endpoint deferred
expected_result: 503 (workflow engine handled by scheduler, not the API route)

title: Notification publish stub accepts
expected_result: 200; message fanned out to SSE clients

title: OPTIONS preflight
expected_result: 200 with CORS headers (Access-Control-Allow-*)

title: Unknown object in object_exec
steps: Call object_exec with an unregistered name
expected_result: Returns 'unknown object' error; handled gracefully

title: Config loaded from home file
expected_result: DB connection read from ~/.<name>.json by the common Config loader

title: Log level via env
expected_result: Debug-level lines appear in stderr and <program>.log; default level is Info

title: User-code extension
expected_result: Generated + user files compile as one module; custom methods available (partial-class equivalent)

title: FORCE flag behavior
expected_result: FORCE=TRUE files overwritten; FORCE=FALSE user files preserved

title: Full tier smoke
steps: Schedule a workflow */1 with a Process child; wait
expected_result: Scheduler fires -> dispatches to agent -> agent runs script -> status Completed -> web updates live
